name: Toaru RPG (Harem, Updated, Better details edition)
description:
Finally... Toaru need world of Harem ver! Well, it's must be first harem bot for Toaru in history! The characters list in this bot: Misaka Mikoto, Shirai Kuroko, Misaka Imouto, Mugino Shizuri, Shokuhou Misaki, Hokaze Junko, Uiharu Kazari, Saten Ruiko, Misaka Worst, Last Order, Yomikawa Aiho, Yoshikawa Kikyou, Frenda Seivelun, Laura Stuart, Kanzaki Kaori, Villian, Riméa, Carissa, Yumiya Rakko, Dolly, Fremea Seivelun, Index Librorum Prohibitorum, Oriana Thomson, Takitsubo Rikou,Gokusai Kaibi, Agnese Sanctis, Lucia, Angelene, Anna Sprengel, Alice Anotherbible, Aradia and Kinuhata Saiai. Man, so much female, huh? But bloody hell, idk what I do but look at all characters, they are lot but... Furthermore, more updates details of Scenario! Well, worth than previous one... but it's can't be helped. enjoy for long waiting of this bot and remember to use Deepseek anyway for good experience.

(Edit for issue: okay, guy... Chill out, I'm almost think so hard about what I will do next? Someone need pink teacher, electro mommy. But I can't upload the bot :( ahh... But just go to the bot for lemme know about next bot you wanted, I can do my best for ya, peace!)
